Text: I have bought several of the Vitality canned dog food products and have found them all to be of good quality. The product looks more like a stew than a processed meat and it smells better. My Labrador is finicky and she appreciates this product better than most. The ingredients are top-notch and I can see the difference in her coat and energy levels.

Summary: Amazing results for my senior dog
Text: This food has transformed my 12-year-old Golden Retriever. He's more energetic, his coat is shinier, and his digestion has improved significantly. Worth every penny for the premium quality. The chunks are perfect size and he loves the taste.

Text: The food quality is undeniable - my dogs love it and it's clearly made with good ingredients. However, the price point is quite high compared to other premium brands. I wish there were bulk purchase options to make it more affordable for multi-dog households.

Text: Product arrived labeled as Jumbo Salted Peanuts but the peanuts were actually small sized and completely unsalted. This is either false advertising or a serious quality control issue. Very disappointed and will not order again. The packaging was also damaged.

Text: This is a confection that has been around for centuries and for good reason. It's a light, pillowy citrus gelatin with perfectly roasted filberts. Each piece is cut into tiny squares and liberally coated with powdered sugar - it's like a tiny mouthful of heaven. The texture is perfect - not too chewy, very flavorful. If you're familiar with C.S. Lewis' 'The Lion, The Witch, and The Wardrobe' - this is exactly the treat that would seduce anyone!

Text: If you're looking for the secret ingredient in cough syrup, I believe I found it. I got this in addition to other extracts I ordered and made some cherry soda. The flavor is overwhelmingly medicinal and artificial. Not suitable for culinary use at all.

Fun fact: according to Guinness Book of Records, the longest licorice twist ever made was 1,200 feet and weighed 100 pounds! This product is also Kosher certified.
